operational_knowledge_units.title: Cell selection displays cell information including QR code
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that when cell selection is active, selecting a cell shows cell information including a QR code.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'When cell selection is selected select a cell to view cell information including QR code.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: In the Cell Selection UI, when cell selection is active and a cell is selected, the UI displays cell information including the cell QR code.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Orange cells represent stations and show station ID with QR code
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that orange cells correspond to stations. Selecting an orange cell shows the station ID along with the QR code.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'If you select an orange cell it will show you the station ID along with the QR code.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: In Cell Selection, orange cells indicate stations. Selecting an orange cell displays the station ID together with the QR code.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: View cell information and QR code from Cell Selection
preconditions: Cell Selection is available in the UI
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide describes selecting a cell in Cell Selection to view cell information including a QR code.

steps.instruction: Select Cell Selection in the UI.
steps.validation_check: The UI is in Cell Selection mode.
steps.visual_region_hint: Cell Selection area referenced by the slide title and bullet text.

steps.expected_outcome: Cell information is shown, including the QR code.
steps.validation_check: A QR code appears in the cell information view.
steps.visual_region_hint: Cell grid or selectable cell area implied by the Cell Selection screen.

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: To view cell information and a QR code in Cell Selection, activate Cell Selection and select a cell. The selected cell displays information including its QR code.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: View station ID and QR code by selecting an orange cell
preconditions: Cell Selection is available in the UI
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide explains that orange cells represent stations and selecting one shows station ID with QR code.

steps.instruction: In Cell Selection, identify an orange cell.
steps.validation_check: The selected candidate cell is orange, which the slide indicates represents a station.
steps.visual_region_hint: Cell grid area containing orange cells.

steps.expected_outcome: The UI shows the station ID along with the QR code.
steps.validation_check: Station ID and QR code are both displayed.
steps.visual_region_hint: Orange station cell and resulting information display area.

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: In Cell Selection, orange cells represent stations. Selecting an orange cell displays the station ID together with the QR code.
